name: lane-four-newsletter
description: Weekly LANE FOUR swim training newsletter: content pipeline + render + no-repeat enforcement.

scripts.weekly: npm run compose && npm run fetch:blog && npm run select:gear && npm run check:no-repeats && npm run build

comment: No runtime npm dependencies: blog and gear come from the site's HTML via scripts/site-source.js (no headless browser); compose/send shell out to the AWS CLI.
